acceptance.assertion: Scout output is change-only rather than a noisy full report.
Scout change-only output covers PR drift, stale reviews, runtime/main drift, unpushed branches, and missing receipts.
Scout does not mutate repositories or runtime state.

goal: Implement a durable Scout that reports only changes such as PR drift, stale reviews, runtime/main drift, unpushed branches, and missing receipts.

metadata.claim_mode_note: Task claim mode describes implementation repository access; resulting grip effects are documented separately.

title: Add durable scout prototype
